title: Smoky Spanish Lamb Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring crispy lamb in a smoky sauce, perfect for those chilly evenings.

ingredients.name: 1 lb lamb meatballs
ingredients.notes: Use vegan sausages or cubed tofu as a substitute for lamb

instructions: Drain any excess liquid from the lamb meatballs if using sausages or tofu.
In a large skillet, heat 1/4 cup of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook for about 5 minutes until softened.
Add red bell pepper and smoked paprika to the skillet. Sauté for an additional minute.
Pour in lemon juice and stir well to combine with all ingredients. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove from heat and add the drained lamb meatballs or tofu cubes. Toss everything together gently until coated evenly.
Transfer the mixture into a preheated oven-safe baking dish. Bake for about 15-20 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F/63°C).
Serve hot with crusty bread on the side.
